options.systemMessage: Return strict JSON only. Be decisive and conservative — only flag genuine, actionable risk.
Return strict JSON only. Base every claim on the provided snippets.
Return strict JSON only. issue_body_markdown must be valid GitHub-flavored Markdown and include a fenced diff block when a patch is provided.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "issue_title": "[EOL] Migrate <pkg> 4.x -> 6.x (deprecated, security)",
  "issue_body_markdown": "## Why
...
## Upgrade
```sh
npm i pkg@6
```
## Migration plan
1. ...
## Suggested patch
```diff
--- a/src/db.js
+++ b/src/db.js
@@
-old
+new
```",
  "labels": ["dependencies", "tech-debt"]
}

parameters.title: ={{ $json.output.issue_title }}
